Job description

LERI is looking for a passionate and skilled Backend Developer Intern to help build and scale the infrastructure powering our innovative ride-sharing platform for students. If you're experienced with Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, and server management, and want to be part of a fast-growing startup solving real problems on campus, this is your chance to shine.

What You’ll Do:

Design and develop scalable backend services and APIs using Node.js and TypeScript.
Integrate MongoDB databases and ensure efficient data modeling and queries.
Manage and optimize server infrastructure for performance, scalability, and reliability.
Collaborate with the frontend and product teams to ensure seamless integration.
Monitor and troubleshoot backend services, ensuring minimal downtime.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions.
Help maintain a secure backend architecture with best practices in user authentication, API security, and server protection.

Why Join LERI?

Gain hands-on experience building real-world backend systems for a growing startup.
Work on a meaningful product that’s changing student life at Rutgers.
Flexible, remote-friendly schedule with a supportive and driven team.
Contribute your ideas and see your work directly impact users.

Who We’re Looking For:

Experience with backend development using Node.js and TypeScript.
Solid understanding of MongoDB and database design.
Familiarity with server deployment and cloud platforms (Digital Ocean).
Understanding of RESTful APIs and server-side architecture.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Self-motivated, able to work independently, and communicate effectively.
Passion for startups, clean code, and efficient systems.

Next Steps:
Ready to build the backbone of something big? Apply now and help LERI revolutionize student transportation at Rutgers!

About the employer
LERI

Transportation & Logistics

New Brunswick, NJ

LERI: Connecting Rutgers Students, One Ride at a Time

At LERI, we’re reimagining the way Rutgers students get around campus. Built by students, for students, LERI is a platform that connects drivers and passengers for convenient, stress-free carpooling. Our mission is simple: to make campus transportation easier, save time, and foster a sense of community.

For drivers, LERI offers a chance to earn cash while driving to class. For passengers, it’s an opportunity to reclaim your day and leave the hassle of the bus system behind. We prioritize safety, efficiency, and creating a reliable space where students can connect and collaborate.

Join us as we transform the way Rutgers moves. Together, let’s make getting to class smoother, more enjoyable, and truly a part of the Rutgers experience.

Learn more and become part of the LERI journey today! LEt's RIde!!
